title: Numerical Computing, Arrays, Visualization, and Reproducibility
description: Implement and test reusable computational models over real datasets. Learners cumulatively produce a tested numerical Python notebook and module through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Explain floating-point approximation and compare values with justified tolerances.
Use NumPy arrays, shapes, dtypes, indexing, and vectorized operations intentionally.
Choose visual encodings, scales, labels, and uncertainty displays that support the question.
